description: Acoustic-first preset for heartfelt Thai lyrics.
vocal_feeling: natural vocal, close and sincere delivery
pacing: gentle verses, memorable chorus, organic ending
instrumentation_style: acoustic guitar, warm piano, light percussion, soft bass, subtle strings
brand_style: heartfelt, simple, sincere, acoustic pop, heartfelt ballad
vocal_style: natural vocal, close and sincere delivery
atmosphere_elements: gentle verses, memorable chorus, organic ending
default_music_style_prompt: heartfelt acoustic pop, acoustic guitar strumming, warm piano, light percussion, sincere vocal, memorable chorus, organic full song
lyric_style: natural conversational Thai lyrics, clear emotional story, not overly poetic

suno_advanced_settings.reason_th: Public beta preset values are controlled and safe for consistent creator output.

writing_rules: Thai lyrics must sound natural and conversational
Hook must be short, emotional, catchy, and caption-friendly
Do not reference real artists or copyrighted artist styles
Instrument and production tags inside parentheses must be English only
Final Chorus should feel stronger than previous chorus

section_instrument_tags.Intro: acoustic guitar fingerpicking, warm piano, intimate atmosphere
section_instrument_tags.Verse 1: gentle guitar, warm bass, intimate vocal
section_instrument_tags.Pre-Chorus: drums build softly, rising emotional tension
section_instrument_tags.Chorus: full pop arrangement, catchy drums, wide guitars
section_instrument_tags.Verse 2: rhythmic guitar and bass, steady groove
section_instrument_tags.Final Chorus: full acoustic band, emotional vocal lift, subtle strings
section_instrument_tags.Outro: soft fade out, lingering piano and guitar
